title: Big Technology AI Summit (full): Greg Brockman, Mike Krieger, Aaron Levie & Friends of The Podcast
summary: Multi-speaker panel at the Big Technology AI Summit (June 2026) discussing the federal recall of Anthropic's Fable and Mythos models, AI infrastructure buildout, enterprise ROI expectations, and competitive dynamics between US and Chinese AI development. Speakers include leaders from OpenAI, Anthropic, Box, Meta, and major tech publications.
writeup: This full session from the Big Technology AI Summit (June 2026) convenes a multi-speaker panel with leaders from OpenAI, Anthropic, Box, Meta, and major tech publications, including Greg Brockman, Mike Krieger, and Aaron Levie. The discussion centers on the federal recall of Anthropic's Fable and Mythos models, alongside AI infrastructure buildout, enterprise ROI expectations, and competitive dynamics between US and Chinese AI development. Recurring threads include the compute race, frontier models, and framings the panel labels tokenmaxxing and outcome maxing.
